pi_items.source: sitemaps.org protocol specification; Magento 2 configuration documentation; daily frequency is recommended for frequently-updated categories
sitemaps.org protocol (priority range 0.0-1.0); Plumrocket Magento 2 documentation recommends 0.8 for categories as they structure the store
sitemaps.org protocol specification; Magento 2 documentation recommends daily for product pages with frequent changes
sitemaps.org protocol (priority range 0.0-1.0); 1.0 is the maximum valid priority value; typical SEO practice recommends 0.5-0.7 for products, but 1.0 is within spec
sitemaps.org protocol specification; weekly frequency is appropriate for CMS pages that change less frequently than products
sitemaps.org protocol (default priority is 0.5); Magento 2 documentation confirms 0.5 as the default and recommended priority for standard content
Standard XML sitemap filename convention; Magento 2 uses 'sitemap.xml' as the default filename for XML sitemaps
Standard XML sitemap root path convention; root path '/' places the sitemap in the webroot directory for public access

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring XML Sitemap settings in Magento 2 and generating a sitemap file. Verified configuration targets are: Categories frequency=daily, priority=0.8 (high priority); Products frequency=daily, priority=1.0 (maximum); CMS Pages frequency=weekly, priority=0.5 (default); sitemap file should be named 'sitemap.xml' and placed at root path '/'. All values comply with sitemaps.org protocol specifications. This is a synthetic configuration task with no external data sources.
